mapper.insert: /* userCanMgmtMapper.userInfoInsService */ INSERT INTO MCP_USER@DL_CAN (USERID, PASSWORD, NAME, AUTH_CODE, PIN, EMAIL, POST, ADDRESS, ADDRESS_DTL, MOBILE_NO, CONTACT_NO, BIRTHDAY, GENDER, SYS_RDATE, SYS_UDATE, SYS_LDATE, LOGIN_COUNT, STATUS, CUST_NUM, AUTH_KEY, USER_DIVISION, EMAIL_CODE, ADDRESS_BJD, REVOCATION_DATE) SELECT USERID, PASSWORD, NAME, AUTH_CODE, PIN, EMAIL, POST, ADDRESS, ADDRESS_DTL, MOBILE_NO, CONTACT_NO, BIRTHDAY, GENDER, SYS_RDATE, SYS_UDATE, SYS_LDATE, LOGIN_COUNT, STATUS, CUST_NUM, AUTH_KEY, USER_DIVISION, EMAIL_CODE, ADDRESS_BJD, REVOCATION_DATE FROM MCP_USER@DL_MCP A WHERE A.STATUS = '1' AND A.AUTH_CODE = 'USER_ROLE' AND A.USER_DIVISION = '00' AND TO_DATE(A.SYS_LDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') < TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -12),'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM MCP_USER@DL_CAN WHERE USERID = A.USERID)
mapper.delete: DELETE /* userCanMgmtMapper.userInfoDelService */ FROM MCP_USER@DL_MCP A WHERE A.STATUS = '1' AND A.AUTH_CODE = 'USER_ROLE' AND A.USER_DIVISION = '00' AND TO_DATE(A.SYS_LDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') < TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -12),'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD')
mapper.update: UPDATE /* userCanMgmtMapper.userInfoUpdService */ CMN_WEBUSER_CAN_MST SET NAME = '삭제' , MOBILE_NO = '' , FIRST_LOGIN_DT = '' , LAST_LOGIN_DT = '' , EMAIL = '' , ZIPCD = '' , ADDRESS = '' , ADDRESS_DTL = '' , RVISN_ID = 'SYSTEM' , RVISN_DTTM = SYSDATE WHERE USERID IN ( SELECT USERID FROM MCP_USER@DL_MCP A WHERE A.STATUS = '1' AND A.AUTH_CODE = 'USER_ROLE' AND A.USER_DIVISION = '00' AND TO_DATE(A.SYS_LDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') < TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -12),'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD'))
